# viettelidc_vks_nfs_storage (Resource)

Provides a VKS NFS Storage resource. Note: Creation is explicitly disabled via Terraform. Use `terraform import` to manage existing NFS Storage.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `cluster_id` (String) ID of the Kubernetes Cluster.
- `storage_size` (Number) Size of the NFS storage in GB.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of the NFS storage resource, formatted as cluster_id/nfs.
- `status` (String) Status of the NFS storage.
